content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.3.9 WARN — PaywallView.swift:11 offers "Leave a 5-star review and get 1 week of Premium free!", explicit quid-pro-quo review incentive.
Pierre: Apple explicitly forbids conditioning app functionality or rewards on ratings/reviews (3.2.2(x), 2.3.9) since this manipulates the App Store's review ecosystem. Here the paywall directly offers a free week of Premium in exchange for a 5-star review, which is textbook incentivized-review copy. Remove this line entirely and instead use SKStoreReviewController's native prompt without tying it to any reward.
